payload.answer: No direct conflict: adding that Sara is your niece is consistent with the existing high-confidence facts and appears to provide an additional relation not contradicted by them.
payload.decision: Add as non-conflicting new relationship with lower confidence.

entity_resolution.reason: Sara appears to refer to the same person as in existing context (same name), but the existing memory only provides Sara's relations to Daniele and Nur; it does not constrain whether she can also be the user's niece, so no direct contradiction is detected.

payload.intent: Resolve whether the new statement about Sara being the user's niece conflicts with existing high-confidence family relationships.

details: Existing facts: Sara is Daniele's daughter and Nur's twin.
New fact: Sara is my niece.
Assessment: Not mutually exclusive; treat as additional relationship with lower/medium confidence due to unspecified link to the user's family.
